blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the functionality of multiple connection methods for the same booking.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having the same booking support multiple connection methods. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm that the system allows for this functionality. While the linked use case describes a scenario involving both virtual and in-person modes, it does not provide concrete evidence that these modes can be selected for the same booking, indicating a gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system allows for the same booking to utilize multiple connection methods.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the functionality of multiple connection methods for the same booking.
